sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 117:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 117:1
items.html: Its vessel is from the phase of Malchut since it is extended from Hod, which is the root of Malchut of the five Hassadim, and the light in it is made of both judgment and mercy. This is so because it has two lights: The first is the residue of the light that Hod gave it, which is the level of Malchut, which is the phase of judgment. The second light is the Hey that reached it from the coupling of ZON of Bina that the Hod illuminated for before it was refined to the level of Malchut. (Inner Light, Item‎ 45)
